J.name: SDK Pivot — Hybrid Architecture
J.notes: Fully deployed and tested on Railway. Fast path (Sonnet, API) + Heavy path (Opus, SDK subprocess). Stream-json progress updates. Interrupt support. Memory MCP server. gws CLI for Google. Fireflies CLI wrapper.

infrastructure.googleAuth: gws CLI config via GWS_CONFIG_B64 env var (base64 tar.gz of ~/.config/gws/)
infrastructure.maxPlan: Claude Max subscription — heavy path costs $0

knownIssues.title: Real confirmation UX — currently blocks with error
hasVectorSupport probe per call — no cache
Old agent/index.ts, search/, email-scan.ts removed — Phase 5 trim complete

currentSprint.name: SDK Pivot — Hybrid Architecture
goals: Railway deployment with Max auth + gws ✅
currentSprint.progress: Sprint complete. Hybrid architecture deployed and tested.

keyDecisions: Hybrid architecture: Haiku router → fast (Sonnet, API) or heavy (Opus, SDK subprocess)
Memory MCP is the only MCP server — Google via gws CLI, Fireflies via CLI wrapper
Stream-json for real-time progress updates during heavy path
Memory writes (update_working_context, store_fact) auto-approved at trust level 1
20min timeout for heavy path, 200 max turns — let Opus cook
Owner can cancel heavy path mid-execution via Slack interrupt

thingsNotToRedo: DON'T REBUILD WHAT COMES NATIVELY WITH CLAUDE — use SDK for orchestration
Don't hardcode prompts in TypeScript — all prompts in config/prompts/*.md (router, synthesis, extraction all externalized)
Don't hardcode tunables in TypeScript — all operational values in config/default.json with Zod schema in config.ts
MCP stdio servers MUST redirect all logging to stderr (LOG_DESTINATION=stderr)
node:22-slim needs ca-certificates installed for external HTTPS (gws, etc.)
Heavy path must strip ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from env so CLI uses Max plan OAuth
One-time DB migrations with guard keys are fragile — guard may not persist. Remove after running.
Don't make ad-hoc prompt fixes for specific situations — diagnose with logs first
Memory writes (working context, store_fact) are internal state, not external writes — auto-approve at trust level 1
Startup crawl always routes to fast path — skip the Haiku router
Short-term context budget must be generous (8000+ tokens) or follow-up messages lose context
gws CLI uses encrypted credentials — must copy full ~/.config/gws/ dir, not just export JSON
